text.content:
Tremere

The Warlocks

In-Clan Disciplines: Auspex, Blood Sorcery, Dominate

Clan Bane

Broken Blood Bond. The Tremere cannot form Blood Bonds with other Kindred — neither as regnant nor thrall. Their blood does not create loyalty in other vampires, and drinking another vampire's blood does not bind them. This makes Tremere politically unreliable — they cannot be bound to a Prince's service, and their own childer may turn against them freely. They can still Bond mortals and ghouls normally.

Compulsion

Perfectionism. The vampire must meet an impossibly high standard in whatever they are currently doing. If they cannot perform a task flawlessly, they would rather not attempt it at all. They will redo completed work, refuse adequate solutions in favor of perfect ones, and criticize others' efforts. Until they achieve a critical success on a relevant roll or abandon the task entirely, they suffer a 2-dice penalty to all rolls.
